testcase.name: captureErrorScreenshotTest

failure.message: Deliberately failing to capture the red UI error in a screenshot. expected [I expect this to be wrong] but found [Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Deliberately failing to capture the red UI error in a screenshot. expected [I expect this to be wrong] but found [Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service] at tests.LoginTest.captureErrorScreenshotTest(LoginTest.java:40) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:328) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1090) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:614) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1474) ... Removed 20 stack frames
